payload.label: dresser
payload.long_description: Close-up of a dark brown wooden dresser about 0.8 m from the camera showing the side panel and partial front with multiple stacked drawers and small metallic knobs; right edge is cropped and the finish appears slightly glossy and worn under low indoor lighting.

message.content: {"label":"dresser","short_description":"dark wooden dresser side crop","long_description":"Close-up of a dark brown wooden dresser about 0.8 m from the camera showing the side panel and partial front with multiple stacked drawers and small metallic knobs; right edge is cropped and the finish appears slightly glossy and worn under low indoor lighting.","attributes":["dark brown wood","stacked horizontal drawers","small metallic knobs","side panel visible","edge-cropped/right crop","glossy worn finish","vertical/tall chest appearance","low indoor lighting"],"distance_from_camera_m":0.8}
